programme.desc: Like it or not - we're a nation of speeders, and we need all the help we can get. So in this episode of Fifth Gear Tiff Needell and Vicki Butler-Henderson are going to help you save your license.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Vicki Butler-Henderson makes some noise in TVR's new T350, a £40,000 coupe which promises 175mph, and 4 seconds to 60. Plus we find the ultimate bargain car.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tiff Needell has a tough assignment. Our selfless road tester has to fly to Nice to drive the ultimate Mercedes-Benz, the flagship of the range, the £120,000 plus CL65.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Fifth Gear reconstructs one of the fastest-growing types of car crashes in Britain; a terror that could turn a pleasant motorway journey into one of the most frightening rides of your life.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: The most frequently asked motoring question is "What's quickest?" Fifth Gear goes to a special test track on the Isle of Anglesey with six of the most desirable performance cars of the moment.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: The pestilential nuisance of cowboy clamping is now more common than ever. There are no rules or regulations governing the renegade companies that organize these rackets.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: In an astonishing series of experiments Tiff Needell and Vicki Butler-Henderson find out just how dangerous ordinary items can be, and how you can best keep them under control in our cars.

programme.title: A Very Merry New Year
programme.desc: Secrets and old ties are exposed when Mary gathers her high school friends together to celebrate the New Year.

programme.title: A Vineyard Christmas
programme.desc: Heather Marques, host of Tannin TV's popular show: Read Between the Vines, is determined to create the perfect Christmas episode by featuring a unique winery from her hometown in Vermont the specialists in Ice Wine.

programme.title: All I Want for Christmas
programme.desc: A young girl stumbles upon a Christmas caper involving a fleet of small robots that just might not be the toys they seem, while helping several friends get Santa's attention for putting them on the naughty list.

programme.title: Alone for Christmas
programme.desc: When a family visits Grandma's house on Christmas Eve, they leave their dog at home alone. And when burglars try to take the presents from under the tree, the dog must use every trick it knows to stop them.

programme.title: Always And Forever Christmas
programme.desc: When marketing exec Lucy learns that she's inherited her grandfather's year-round Christmas store, "Forever Christmas," she makes a trip back home to support the store during its final Christmas season.

programme.title: Christmas Break-In
programme.desc: Christmas Break-In is the story of Izzy, a spunky nine-year-old who gets left at school on the last day before Christmas break. Hijinks ensue when three bumbling crooks break in and take the school janitor hostage.

programme.title: Christmas By Candlelight
programme.desc: Juliet pitches Christmas memory candles to her boss in hopes of earning a promotion and enlists the help of boutique candle store owner, Tom. He refuses at first but agrees when he realizes the money will help make his daughter's Christmas wish come true.

programme.title: Christmas Casanova
programme.desc: Elise is a podcaster in need of catchy Christmas content. Elise agrees to be Daniyal's wing woman and guide. As the two scramble to build the best Christmas ever, it becomes clear that Daniyal might be trying to win over the wrong woman.

programme.title: Popstar: Never Stop Never Stopping
programme.desc: When it becomes clear that his solo album is a failure, a former boy band member does everything in his power to maintain his celebrity status.

programme.title: Fear of a Black Hat
programme.desc: A mockumentary chronicling the rise and fall of NWH, a not particularly talented--or particularly bright but always controversial--hip-hop group.

programme.title: This Is Spinal Tap
programme.desc: Undoubtedly the funniest film ever made about rock and roll, Rob Reiner's satire about an over-the-hill heavy metal band is a priceless look at the music business and it's madness.

programme.title: Anchorman: The Legend of Ron Burgundy
programme.desc: Enter the world of 1970s TV news, where Ron Burgundy and his loyal Channel 4 News Team are San Diego's #1 rated news source. All is well in their male-dominated world of news until rising star reporter Veronica Corningstone turns it upside down.

programme.title: Anchorman 2: The Legend Continues
programme.desc: The wait is over, America -- Ron Burgundy is back! After losing his job, Ron reassembles the news team and squares off against a new rival in the comedy that critics are calling one of the funniest movies of the year!

programme.title: Old School
programme.desc: Three men are disenchanted with life and try to recapture their college days.

programme.title: How To Be A Latin Lover

programme.title: The Summit
programme.desc: Sixteen strangers trek the New Zealand Alps with $1M each, facing extreme challenges and brutal twists.

programme.title: Studs
programme.desc: Twas a positive experience for all.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: Emotions explode when one model is confronted about constantly talking behind her competitors' backs, and "Entertainment Tonight" correspondent Kevin Frazier teaches the girls about the importance of never letting their guard down in public.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: Challenged by J. Alexander to pose like statues in a park, the models find the task to be a little too realistic as they're swarmed by pigeons, and one competitor suspects another of stealing.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: After Barney's New York Creative Director Simon Doonan and Twiggy teach the girls about the different British fashion trends, the competitors are sent to impress top London designers by dressing in each trend.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: The queens compete in a star-studded tv game show featuring their most fabulous & funny celebrity impersonations. With extra special guest judges comedian Ross Mathews & original Dreamgirl Loretta Devine.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: With only three models remaining, the girls are first challenged to shoot a CoverGirl commercial and a national print ad, and after one competitor is eliminated, legendary photographer Gilles Bensimon shoots each of the final two girls.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The three remaining models must shoot a CoverGirl commercial and a national print advertisement. With one eliminated, Gilles Bensimon shoots the survivors alongside Tyra Banks for the cover of ELLEgirl.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The 32 hopeful contestants arrived in a Pasadena hotel to start a runway challenge. Tyra selected the 13 finalists to enter the competition.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: After the models battle it out to make the final cut, they are shocked to learn they will be going bald.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: The dolls design ship-shaped parade floats for a pride-filled runway extravaganza. With extra special guest judges Kelly Osbourne and NCIS' Pauley Perrette

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: The queens turn the publishing industry on its wig as they launch their own magazines. With extra special guest judges actress Regina King & country legend Pam Tillis.

programme.title: Alone
programme.desc: As the days pass, the remaining survivalists show signs of cracking.

programme.title: Alone
programme.desc: A punishing storm batters the remaining men and gale force winds rip through their makeshift camps.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: Special Agents Maggie Bell and OA Zidan rush to track down an active sniper with an elusive motive as the body count continues to rise.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: Special Agents Maggie Bell and OA Zidan investigate the death of a safety inspector and its possible connection to a lead at a nuclear power plant.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: After a senator's daughter is kidnapped and held for ransom, the FBI is called in to assist with finding the little girl before their time limit expires.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: Maggie and OA hunt down a ruthless group of robbers who are posing as NYPD officers to target armored trucks.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: Maggie and OA lead the search for an abducted former biological weapons chemist

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: After a key witness and a U.S. marshal are ambushed and killed, Maggie and OA must track down a man who leaked the information that led to their murders.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: While investigating the murder of a rap star, the team uncovers a conspiracy of embezzlement and bribery which may be connected to his death. Meanwhile, Charlie prepares to meet Amita's parents for the first time.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Don and Charlie find themselves in conflict over their differing beliefs as they investigate a case involving national security. Meanwhile, Megan faces a crisis of conscience and leaves the team, on the fourth season finale.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Don and the team hunt down the killers of two rock climbers in possession of a stolen diamond, while Charlie decides if he should get his FBI clearance reinstated and a new agent joins the team, on the fifth season premiere.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: The team investigates a pattern of increased ATM kidnappings when a woman who was abducted and forced to withdraw random amounts of money from her ATM is murdered. Also, Charlie meets the man who will decide the fate of his FBI security clearance.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: The team searches for Colleen McGrath (AUDREY MARIE ANDERSON), a struggling, young, single mother who vanishes after leaving her 3-year-old son in his baby-sitter's care.

programme.title: Dexter
programme.desc: Season 7 premiere. After witnessing her brother kill Travis Marshall, Debra (Jennifer Carpenter) attempts to reconcile with Dexter (Michael C. Hall) while struggling to cover up their involvement with the murder.

programme.title: Dexter
programme.desc: Season 8 premiere. Six months after LaGuerta's death, Dexter (Michael C. Hall) is still managing life as a dad, brother, and serial killer. Meanwhile, Miami Metro investigates the murder of a man who's had pieces of his brain removed.

programme.title: The Matador
programme.desc: A globetrotting hitman and a salesman form an unlikely relationship after meeting at a hotel bar in Mexico City.

programme.title: The Thomas Crown Affair (1968)
programme.desc: Steve McQueen stars as a sophisticated but bored tycoon who pulls off a bank heist so stunning that even Boston's finest are baffled. Faye Dunaway is the sleek insurance investigator out to bring him in but who, ultimately, falls in love with him.

programme.title: Wild Target
programme.desc: A hitman tries to retire, but a beautiful thief may change his plans.

programme.title: The Score
programme.desc: When safe cracker Nick decides it's time to settle down with his girlfriend Diane and stick to his legitimate business, running a jazz nightclub, his friend and partner Max has other plans.

programme.title: The Godfather
programme.desc: A chilling portrait of the Corleone family's rise and near fall from power in America along with balancing the story of the Sicilian clan's ugly crime business in which they are engaged.

programme.title: The Godfather Part II
programme.desc: The continuing saga of a young Vito Corleone growing up in Sicily and in New York during the 1910s and then following Michael Corleone in the 1950s as he tries to expand the family business.

programme.title: The Fall Of The House Of Usher (1960)
programme.desc: When a beautiful young woman's suitor arrives to ask her hand in marriage, the doors of the mysterious house of Usher fling open...and terror begins.

programme.title: The Pit and the Pendulum (1961)
programme.desc: Vincent Price slowly goes crazy because he thinks his wife was buried alive (a plot between his wife and her lover to get his money). Now totally insane, he starts to murder.

programme.title: The Raven (1963)
programme.desc: The sorcerer Craven learns from fellow magician Dr. Bedlo that his supposedly dead wife is alive and living at the castle of master sorcerer Dr. Scarabus.

programme.title: The Masque of the Red Death (1964)
programme.desc: When the sadistic prince (Vincent Price) finds that the Red Death has arrived in the village he rules, he forsakes his people and hides in his castle with his fellow aristocrats…until a mysterious stranger turns his haven into a danse macabre!

programme.title: Mommie Dearest
programme.desc: The public Crawford was strong-willed, glamorous and admirable, but “Mommie Dearest” reveals the private Crawford, the woman desperate to be a mother, adopting her children when she was single and trying to survive in the devastating movie industry.

programme.title: The Toxic Avenger
programme.desc: Tromaville has a monstrous new hero. The Toxic Avenger is born when meek mop boy Melvin falls into a vat of toxic waste. Now evildoers will have a lot to lose.

programme.title: Phantasm
programme.desc: It's about the Tall Man, a supernatural and malevolent undertaker who turns the dead into dwarf zombies to do his bidding and take over the world.

programme.title: My Bloody Valentine (1981)
programme.desc: 20 years ago, a tragic accident on Valentine's Day took the lives of 5 miners when supervisors left their posts to attend a Valentine's Day dance. On the disaster's first anniversary, the only survivor returns to the town for bloody revenge

programme.title: John Grisham's The Rainmaker
programme.desc: Matt Damon plays Rudy Baylor, a rookie lawyer in over his head on a high-profile case. Opposing him: an army of legal sharks. On Rudy’s side: Deck Shifflet, a feisty “paralawyer” who specializes in flunking the bar exam.

programme.title: Boogie Nights
programme.desc: In this dark, comic drama, a gullible teenager takes a turbulent journey through the worlds of pornography, disco and fleeting stardom in the '70s, when drugs were in vogue, fashion was in flux and the party never seemed to stop.

programme.title: School Ties
programme.desc: After receiving a scholarship to an exclusive prep school, working-class teen David Greene becomes a star athlete and wins the attention of a beautiful debutante.

programme.title: Two for the Money
programme.desc: After suffering a career-ending knee injury, a former college football star aligns himself with one of the most renowned touts in the sports-gambling business.

programme.title: Hoosiers
programme.desc: A man gets a last-chance job coaching a small-town Indiana high-school basketball team and faces the dual challenge of bringing this underdog team to the 1951 state championship and redeeming himself from a mysterious past.

programme.title: The Iceman
programme.desc: The story of Richard Kuklinski, the notorious contract killer and family man. When finally arrested in 1986, neither his wife nor daughters had any clue about his real profession.

programme.title: The Monster Squad
programme.desc: Young kids form a club that is devoted to monsters but soon get more than they bargained for when Dracula adjourns to Earth, with Frankenstein's Monster, Wolfman, Mummy, and the Gillman.

programme.title: The Brothers Grimm
programme.desc: In this visionary film, Will and Jake Grimm dazzle small towns with their imaginative folklore and elaborate illusions, only to discover many of the fantastic characters, and thrilling situations, found in their beloved fairy tales are real.

programme.title: Fun Size
programme.desc: Wren is a whip girl whose plans to attend the high school event of the year ends when she has to babysit her brother. When he disappears, Wren must set out to find him before her mom discovers heʼs missing.

programme.title: Coraline
programme.desc: Coraline Jones discovers a secret world that's like her own, but better! When her Other Mother tries to keep her, Coraline must be brave to get home.

programme.title: ParaNorman
programme.desc: Norman Babcock finds his paranormal abilities pushed to their limits to take on zombies and ghosts, and save his town from a centuries-old curse.

programme.title: Labyrinth
programme.desc: Sixteen-year-old Sarah must solve a labyrinth to rescue her baby brother when he is taken by the Goblin King.

programme.title: Noah

programme.desc: Chef Ramsay is in the Big Apple to revamp Dillon's, an Indian restaurant just blocks away from his own thriving eatery. Stubborn owner Mohammed loses approximately $25,000-$50,000 a month.

programme.title: The Sporting Chef

programme.desc: The story of the greatest Roman of them all - Julius Caesar. His own memoirs guide us through his journey from bankrupt civil servant to invincible general.

programme.title: Rome: World's First Superpower

programme.title: Rome: World's First Superpower

programme.title: Jimmy Two Shoes
programme.desc: Jimmy is fed up with Heloise and Beezy’s constant bickering, so he arranges a contest to see who can make nice. --- Jimmy has saved Lucius’ life, so Lucy must now scramble to endanger Jimmy’s life and return the favor.

programme.title: Jimmy Two Shoes
programme.desc: Jez wants Lucius to try a youthful new look, so Lucy tricks Jimmy into swapping hairstyles. --- When the ghost of pizza-crusts-past starts haunting Beezy, it’s up to Jimmy to make things right.

programme.title: Jimmy Two Shoes
programme.desc: Jimmy is jealous when he’s the only one in Miseryville who can’t grow a mustache. --- Beezy hires a butler to clean his room, but he soon has his new manservant living his entire life for him.

programme.title: Jimmy Two Shoes
programme.desc: When Jimmy can’t stomach ‘Sludge Ice Cream,’ Misery Inc. puts it into full production. --- One of the Weavils feigns an injury and tricks his way into Jimmy’s home.

programme.title: Jimmy Two Shoes
programme.desc: The new Misery Inc. catalogue is out, and Jimmy, thinking that the stuff is free, orders up every item. --- Jimmy and Beezy compete to snag the coveted hoof prints of Wrecken, their favourite soccer star.

programme.title: Jimmy Two Shoes
programme.desc: Jimmy introduces a stressed-out Lucius to the foreign concept of a “vacation.” --- Heloise, Jimmy, and Beezy attempt to unite Cerbee with his true love, Jez's boohuahua "Jazmeen".

programme.title: Jimmy Two Shoes
programme.desc: After two racecar-driving fleas infest Jimmy’s and Beezy’s brains, the boys vie for title of fastest Miseryvillian. --- Jimmy tries Heloise’s ‘People Copier’ and ends up with an army of ‘Himmies’ who mimic his every move.

programme.title: Sonic Boom
programme.desc: Every time Sonic runs, his speed causes a deafening tone, so he's forced to give up his speed until a solution can be found. / Tails reprograms one of Eggman's robots and accidentally turns it into a killing machine.

programme.title: Sonic Boom
programme.desc: A meteor causes Sonic and Eggman to exchange bodies. / Orbot and Cubot wake up with no memory of the previous day's events and discover that Eggman is missing.

programme.title: Sonic Boom
programme.desc: When a berry picking machine created by Tails goes nuts and defoliates an orchard, a group of villains thinks Tails is one of them and inducts him into their evil organization. / Eggman is injured during a battle with Sonic.

programme.title: Sonic Boom
programme.desc: After an explosion at his evil lair sends him into a time loop, Eggman relives the same day over and over. / Dr. Eggman markets his brand of tomato sauce.

programme.title: Sonic Boom
programme.desc: To prove that he is an inventor like Tails, Knuckles challenges Tails to participate in the local robot battle./ Dr. Eggman's particle accelerator has been stolen, and all evidence points to Sonic.

programme.title: Sonic Boom
programme.desc: Eggman is making a movie about his life. He even tries to cast Sonic to play a lame version of Sonic. / Knuckles wants to win the village's annual Chili Dog Cook-Off. He sets out on a quest to find the perfect ingredients.

programme.title: Scaredy Squirrel
programme.desc: Scaredy promises Dave that he will ride a rollercoster at the fair. Then, Scaredy investigates why they stopped making his favorite snack.

programme.title: Scaredy Squirrel
programme.desc: Scaredy loses an acorn that completes his collection. Then, Scaredy meets his stacking hero and tries to help him regain his greatness.

programme.title: Scaredy Squirrel
programme.desc: Scaredy has to spend the night guarding the store and comes face to face with a burglar. Then, Scaredy tries to spend more time with his first crush.

programme.title: Scaredy Squirrel
programme.desc: Scaredy rids a holiday of commercialization. Then, Scaredy's suggestion box proves to be a bad suggestion that he shouldn't have suggested.

programme.title: Scaredy Squirrel
programme.desc: When Paddleball camp doesn't go as planned, Scaredy tries to save himself and the other campers. Then, Scaredy becomes the Balsa weatherman.

programme.title: Scaredy Squirrel
programme.desc: Scaredy tries to bring the work gang together as a team. Then, when thugs threaten to eat everything in Balsa, Scaredy must protect the store.

programme.title: Jimmy Two Shoes
programme.desc: After two racecar-driving fleas infest Jimmy’s and Beezy’s brains, the boys vie for title of fastest Miseryvillian. --- Jimmy tries Heloise’s ‘People Copier’ and ends up with an army of ‘Himmies’ who mimic his every move.

programme.title: Jimmy Two Shoes
programme.desc: Jimmy suspects that his new neighbor is really the thing he fears most… a giant pickle. --- Jimmy and Beezy vie to join the Rodeo Clown's 'Cool Clown Club'.

programme.title: Jimmy Two Shoes
programme.desc: Jimmy turns the tables on Lucius Fools Day, the one day a year when Lucy gets to inflict more misery than usual. --- After accidentally lopping off Lucius’ horns, Jimmy must turn to one of Heloise's concoctions to make things right.

programme.title: Jimmy Two Shoes
programme.desc: When the Heinous Museum is under attack, Heloise and Jimmy are pressed into security service. --- Lucius and the Weavils sign a peace treaty forcing Beezy to marry the unsightly Princess Weavil.

programme.title: Jimmy Two Shoes
programme.desc: After Beezy crushes the commander of the Gnomans, the tiny army of laborers makes him their new leader. --- When Heloise catches a mean case of the hiccups, the boys must (for once) take matters into their own hands.

programme.title: Jimmy Two Shoes
programme.desc: When Jimmy starts spending all his time with Beezy, Heloise decides to teach the boys a lesson. --- When an obsessed bus driver adopts Jimmy as his new best friend, it’s all buses, all the time.

programme.title: Jimmy Two Shoes
programme.desc: Beezy is jealous when his new pet rock favors Jimmy. --- Jimmy poses as Molotov and joins Lucius on the mission to defeat the horrible ‘Moon Beast’.

programme.title: Skylanders Academy

programme.desc: Over the annual “Thankstaking” holiday, Spyro and Elf accidentally get locked inside the Grand Library's relics room while everyone is gone for the long weekend.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Leah gets difficult news about Ali from Corey, Jenelle finds out the sex of her baby, Kailyn and Javi butt heads over childcare, and Chelsea gets in trouble over a favor for a friend.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Norma cae otra vez en la farsa de Dínora quien se ingenia una insólita historia con Gabriela de cómplice, Martín sospecha de su hija. Jimena regresa con tropiezos a la filmación del comercial.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Los matones ponen una bomba en la hacienda Reyes pero se equivocan de carro, Franco descubre que fue un atentado en su contra. Martín aconseja a Sara y confronta a Gabriela y a Fernando.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Franco llega al restaurante y Armando queda impresionado, Reyes culpa a Rosario del atentado por perseguirlo. Martín le dice a Norma que Dínora, Gabriela y Fernando quieren separarla de Juan.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Juan descubre el juego de Julieta con su hermano. Paula aprovecha el momento para presionar al hombre que ama, sin imaginar que José está allí para enfrentarla. Las amantes de Emilio siguen sufriendo por sus pecados en el pasado.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Juan trata de sacar a Paula de su vida con dinero, pero ella no está dispuesta. Sofía intenta convencerla para que firme el acuerdo y se vayan las dos para siempre de la casa. Pedro y Julieta son descubiertos y se declara una guerra entre hermanos.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: José traiciona a su hermano por dinero e intenta aliarse con Pedro para quitarle la administración de la hacienda. Sofía hace revelaciones a Paula sobre la identidad de su padre, para empujarla a tomar las decisiones que ella está tramando.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: José reúne a todos los hermanos y se enfrenta a Juan porque quiere reemplazarlo. Julieta mantiene su posición con dignidad y no accede a hacer las paces con su marido, mientras Paula decide seguir insistiendo sin saber que una verdad la persigue.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: La noche tiene mucha seducción entre Verónica y Alejandro. David se presenta ante Verónica y le dice que le recuerda a su madre, a quién desprecia. Ella disimula cuánto le afecta el comentario. Antonia quiere matar poco a poco a la abuela de Valentina.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Verónica logra despistar a David, pero cuando él se va, ella se viene abajo. La nueva Patrona atrae el interés de todos y Antonia está furiosa al ver que sus aliados la ignoran, incluyendo su amante. Verónica consigue que Alberto se ponga de su lado.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Antonia se presenta en la casa de Verónica para declararle la guerra y la trata como si fuera Gabriela. Dantés la reta a desenterrar los restos de la minera muerta. La patrona Guerra acepta, pero Alejandro se opone rotundamente a la exhumación.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Antonia y Verónica hacen las paces tras confirmarse que el cadáver en la tumba corresponde a Gabriela Suárez. Ricardo le confiesa su problema de impotencia a Alejandro, al tiempo que le reclama el daño que le ha hecho a Patricia. Macario queda libre.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Franco llega al restaurante y Armando queda impresionado, Reyes culpa a Rosario del atentado por perseguirlo. Martín le dice a Norma que Dínora, Gabriela y Fernando quieren separarla de Juan.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Óscar y Jimena alargan su divorcio, él le pide que ayude a Juan, lo mismo hace Franco con Sara, las dos prometen hablar con Norma. Rosario reconoce que su matrimonio es un fracaso.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Fernando se queja con Gabriela de la paliza que le dieron los Reyes, Sara revela que él la atacó y le dice a Norma que su mamá y Dínora buscan alejarla de Juan. Óscar descubre a Eva.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Election fever grips the Addams household, as Gomez (John Astin) supports the council candidate whose campaign promise is to drain the town's disgusting bogs. Morticia (Carolyn Jones), who likes "the lovely bogs," labels the candidate an extremist.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley and Wednesday start a row at a party when their gift of a tarantula upsets Harold, the birthday boy. Harold's parents insist that the Addams children lack breeding and, therefore, are no longer allowed to play with their son.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: After Pugsley befriends Gorgo, a circus gorilla, Gorgo decides to follow Pugsley and Gomez home, where is accepted as one of the family. But Gorgo gives Morticia's tea guests, the Ladies League members, quite a shock.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A pair of bank robbers are welcomed as Halloween trick-or-treaters by Morticia and Gomez. The creepy atmosphere of the house, Morticia's smoldering holiday punch, and Lurch's ominous presence impel the crooks to abandon their plans.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Lionel Barker, a former suitor of Morticia's, shows up, Gomez is jealous. But he's soon calmed when he learns that Barker is after Mildred, the new maid. The Addamses then discover that Barker is a con man--after Mildred's money, not her love.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Newlyweds move in next door. But the honeymoon loses its tranquility when Uncle Fester enters their house through a tunnel and they flee in terror at the sight of Lurch, Grandmama sharpening her ax, and Morticia and Gomez bathing the octopus.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family faces a crisis when Wednesday packs her spider and runs away (after being scolded for playing with Uncle Fester's TNT). When they try to file a missing person report, a detective is anxious to retire early due to their story.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Official visitors from an unfriendly nation receive the shock of their lives when they decide to exploit the Addams Family as an average uncultured family. The visitors are shaken up by Morticia's carnivorous plants among other things.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's cousin, Melancholia, wants to marry Clarence P. Harvey after most of her marital prospects have joined the Foreign Legion. Clarence recoils when Melancholia puts on a campaign to win him, backed by Morticia, Gomez and Clarence's boss.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes a veritable gazelle when he takes dancing lessons at Gomez and Morticia's suggestion after he admits to being a wallflower at social functions. Each member of the Addams Family teaches Lurch a different step.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama's paintings leave an art critic speechless, so Gomez sends for his friend, Sam Picasso, to teach Grandmama to paint in the abstract. The starving artist ignores Grandmama's and Morticia's work as he eats and paints.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Rockland Cartright III is a beatnik who crashes his motorbike into a tree and recuperates at the Addams house. Each regards the other as an oddity, although the family learns to appreciate certain aspects of Rockland's life.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Mr. Briggs, the postman, is hired by the government to do undercover work in the Addams house. While pretending to be a stamp collector, he investigates rumors that coded radio messages are being sent from the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch's tiny fire-eating mother visits and demands that Lurch's employers wait on her boy hand-and-foot after Lurch leads her to believe that it's his house. Lurch revels in the unexpected attention he gets from Morticia and Gomez.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's electrical output fails abruptly. Should they call a doctor or an electrician to bring Fester back? Morticia prescribes a bowl of porcupine mold, and both she and Gomez agree that long exposure to moon rays would be beneficial.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family would like to vacation on the moon, but the billion-dollar travel cost is slightly prohibitive. Uncle Fester volunteers $21.13 and Morticia, using Gomez's new supercomputer, suggests placing a $2,000 bet on the daily double horse race.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Cousin Itt is advocated as curator of the local zoo. Gomez uses his influence with Park Commissioner Fisk (guest star Alan Reed) to promote Itt for the job, but the zookeepers are convinced the Addamses' cousin should be confined to a cage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama (Blossom Rock) is hauled off to jail for setting up a fortune-telling booth in the Addamses' living room. Gomez (John Astin) volunteers to act as attorney, and the court session becomes a shambles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez (John Astin) loses his memory after hitting his head; he fails to recognize Morticia (Carolyn Jones) and says the house looks like a condemned museum. The Addamses take turns hitting Gomez on the head trying to help him regain his memory.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Thing disappears from his box. Failing to find a single trace of Thing, Gomez (John Astin) conducts an investigation--with all members of the household under suspicion. Also starring Carolyn Jones, Jackie Coogan, and Ted Cassidy.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester applies for a job as an insurance salesman with the same company which is threatening to cancel the Addamses' policy (because Fester keeps blowing things up). Fester convinces the company interviewer that he is qualified for the job.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes inconsolable when Gomez donates the family antique harpsichord to a collector. Gomez and Morticia offer Lurch a balalaika and a set of drums. When this proves unsatisfactory, Gomez and Fester decide to build a new harpsichord.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Morticia hears the stock market has crashed, she assumes that Gomez has been financially wiped out and rallies the family to help make money. Morticia gives lessons, Lurch and Fester run an escort service, and the kids run a poison drink stand.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While enjoying a moonlight picnic and snail hunt, the Addams Family is mistaken for Martians by uniformed investigators from Mysterious Space Objects Headquarters. In turn, Gomez (John Astin) and the clan regard their inquisitors with suspicion.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: An organ grinder's fugitive monkey leads Fester to believe that he has turned Pugsley into a monkey. Morticia and Gomez treat the monkey as though he were their son, welcoming him to the dinner table and giving him Pugsley's chores.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's favorite charity is having an auction--so Morticia persuades her family to part with things to sell. Donations include Wednesday's headless doll, the old flogging table, a stuffed vulture and Uncle Fester's dynamite.

programme.title: The Addams Family

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: See Jack dive with a bull shark, encounter a highly venomous sea snake and get in a sticky situation with a sea creature. Then Jack takes part in some local traditions and learns of Fiji's ominous past.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jack as he heads to Australia's Gold Coast. Meet a rare blue-eyed koala, feed a Tasmanian devil and watch a tiger jump over Jack! Things get messy when Jack meets up with some boys from the outback and tries his hand at an Aussie tradition.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack as he heads back to his old stomping grounds near Knoxville, Tennessee! He takes his family to his old farm, the Knoxville Zoo, and the University of Tennessee for a special visit with Smokey the Dog.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Come along with Jack for his favorite gorilla treks from Rwanda's Virunga Mountains. The Hanna's also visit veterinarians working with the wild gorillas, and a very special orphanage.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack for a journey into the Danger Zone. He’s coming face-to-face with a deadly bushmaster, visiting mountain lions in close quarters, crossing paths with a grumpy elephant, climbing into a cave filled with bats, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack as he meets creatures thriving in their tropical island homes, like the Bison of Catalina Island, Flamingos in Curacao, Sea Lions in the Galapagos, along with Bats, Dolphins, and a special island dedicated to Monkeys!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Join Jack as he counts down six species that makes their homes at the top of the world: chimpanzees in mountains of Africa, guanacos in the Andes of Patagonia, Alaska’s enormous brown bears and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Back to the Wild
programme.desc: When animals get injured in the wild, conservationists and veterinarians step in to lend a helping hand. In this Wild Countdown Jack is counting down six special stories of lucky creatures returning to their native habitats!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jungle Jack travels to the Florida Keys to visit a hospital dedicated to saving sea turtles. They return a rescued sea turtle back to the wild and meet some incredible patients at the hospital.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Does having a big brain mean you’re the smartest? Find out on today’s countdown as Jungle Jack meets the biggest brainiacs of the animal kingdom, like dolphins, elephants, dogs, sperm whales, chimpanzees and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Jack's Scariest Countdown
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack for a heart-pounding adventure with lions, crocs, king cobras, sea snakes, bats and Tasmanian devils!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack is heading to Mt. Kenya where not one, but two extinct species are about to make a comeback. Come along with Jack as he discovers how the elusive bongo antelope and the stunning white zebra are being reintroduced Into the Wild.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jack behind the scenes for some of his most memorable moments like getting pecked by an ostrich, tangling with a snake, taking fashion advice from a Samburu warrior, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack is heading to the island-nation of Curacao for some quality time with its winged residents. From fearless flying Bats, and powerful Ostrich to pretty-in-pink Flamingos.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jungle Jack travels to the Florida Keys to return twin orphaned Manatees back to the wild, before visiting the Dolphin Research Center.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack journeys to Nairobi where he and Sue learn to care for baby elephant orphans at a truly groundbreaking animal nursery. Then they come face to face with some of the country's tallest citizens – the endangered Rothschild giraffe.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Colossal Creatures
programme.desc: Jack travels the world meeting six colossal creatures, like the African elephant, Galapagos tortoise, ostrich, whale shark, mandrill and anaconda!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Just outside the city of Santiago, Chile there are people working to conserve and protect their native wildlife. Join Jack as he meets up with a family who started out taking in abandoned pets and ended up running a rehab center for rescued primates.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jack and his daughter Kathaleen as they travel to Tanzania's Tarangire National Park. They search for an elusive elephant called Big Mamma and encounter tons of wildlife along the way.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Animal Rest Stops

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: Jack heads south from the tip of South America to the frozen wonderland of Antarctica. During his adventures, Jack experiences a colony of Gento Penguins and the desolation of Deception Island.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jungle Jack brings us bouncing baby animals from around the world. Some are cute, some are cuddly, and some bring us hope for the next generation of wildlife.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Hoof It

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Estelle Castlewood (Celeste Holm) begins to discover what a charming gentleman Bertram McDonald (Sir John Mills) is when she meets him as an equal aboard ship in "A Good and Faithful Servant.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Two shy people keep missing each other, due in part to Gopher's interference; two residents of old folks home take a cruise, only to be followed by their meddling children.

programme.title: The Love Boat

programme.title: The Love Boat

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: At the scene of a murder, sometimes the victim provides the only clues to their killer. Forensic anthropologists use skeletal remains to decipher the clues written in the bones.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A woman's body is found and investigators have little time and few clues to lead them to a killer who could strike again. Perpetrators try to conceal their crimes, yet savvy investigators can take the most obscure data and recreate a murder.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Investigators are always on the cutting edge of new forensic techniques that can help them solve cases more accurately. An experimental “brain fingerprinting” technique has already won the acquittal of a police officer accused of a drug charge.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: The tread of a tire, a single shoe print and even the shape of a bruise help investigators track down killers, based solely on their patterns of guilt.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Some cases simply can't be solved with current technology or with the evidence at hand. But that doesn't mean they'll remain unsolved forever.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: An abandoned car outside Philadelphia brings heartbreak to a family and terror to a community. A young woman is dead, the killer gone. But the marks of his passage remain.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A woman is found dead at the bottom of the basement stairs. As detectives look into the accident, they begin to question the sequence of events.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: DNA analysis overturns the convictions of three men who have spent years behind bars, paying for crimes they did not commit.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Sometimes killers are careful to leave no fingerprints behind. But methods of the murder itself can leave a lasting impression on police, especially when the tools (or weapons) of a killer's trade leave an innocent victim marked for death.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: For a price, anything's possible. Contract killings arose out of the need to establish the perfect alibi. By hiring someone else to do the dirty work, a person can deflect guilt, at least in theory.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Approximately 1.8 million Americans are reported missing each year. Some are runaways who find their way home, but others simply disappear. When foul play is suspected, investigators turn to forensics to find the missing.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: For serial killers, once is never enough. For investigators, the challenge is steep when the killers murder by numbers.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Some people murder for love. But these killers did it for the money. When greed is the motive, investigators must make every clue pay off.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Sometimes when a death seems to be accidental or the result of a tragic accident, it is up to forensic scientists to reveal the deception lying just below the surface.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Two pranksters write away for a mail-order bride, using Lucas's name.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas recognizes Dr. Battle as an ex-gunslinger with whom he once fought. He helps with a dying man, but Lucas and the doctor have unresolved anger.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A Chinese man and his son fight prejudice as they try to open a laundry in North Fork.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: While Lucas and Mark are traveling across the Mexican desert they encounter a trio of Mexican bandits who demand payment to cross "their" desert.

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark and Milly are held hostage in her general store when two gunmen attempt a daring robbery.

programme.desc: Two prison wagon drivers stop at the McCain ranch looking for whiskey. Lucas turns them down because they are escorting a murderer, to be hanged in Yuma.

programme.desc: Mark goes to work for Will Temple, a badly scarred, very mysterious rancher.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Corey Hazlett insists he's innocent of murder, despite Lucas's eyewitness testimony.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas tries to dissuade a latter-day knight from rushing into battle.

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas tries to stop embittered John Holliver from venting his wrath on the people who expelled him from town years before.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas becomes the target of a vengeful mountaineer after he is responsible for a young mountain boy's death.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Mark is kidnapped and held for ransom, he finds himself an unwilling companion of gunman Carl Avery.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas seeks an escape when he's captured by outlaws while seeking help for an injured Mark.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The young Queen-to-be of France hides out in North Fork with her sick brother.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A notorious killer is being held in the North Fork jail. When word gets around that Gordo's gang is on its way to free him, the whole town becomes frightened.

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An Englishman arrives with a custom-made rifle and a plan to kill Lucas.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark falls head-over-heels in puppy love.

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: As the world grows more dangerous and Lori's pregnancy advances, Rick locates a potentially safe haven.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: A medical emergency proves traumatic and leaves a life hanging in the balance; Rick and the group discover a potential threat to their new surroundings.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Andrea and Michonne witness an accident that leads them to a new group of survivors, but when tensions arise with their new acquaintances, they must make a decision.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The group becomes severed, putting lives in jeopardy; in Woodbury, Merle approaches the Governor to make a request.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick struggles after another loss; Michonne grows more suspicious of the Governor, who throws a party for the people of Woodbury.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Andrea and the Governor grow closer while Michonne makes a decision about Woodbury; Glenn and Maggie go on a run; Rick struggles with grief.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: A new guest at the prison forces Rick's hand; members of the group go on a mission to rescue Glenn and Maggie; the Governor presses for information.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Andrea steps up when the people of Woodbury are thrown into uncharted territory; a new threat arises at the prison.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick tries to save one of his group; Woodbury is in disarray; new guests at the prison raise concerns.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The group debates the next step; Rick searches for a lost friend; Daryl and Merle question their choices; the Governor restores order.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Realizing they're running out of supplies, the group must make a choice when security is threatened; Andrea goes to the prison to attempt a negotiation.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Realizing they are outgunned, Rick leads an expedition to get more weapons and fortify their group against the Governor and his forces.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick and the Governor convene for a tense negotiation of a peace treaty between their respective groups, hoping to prevent more deaths.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The Governor chases a fleeing dissenter; while the Governor is gone, a traitor tries to sabotage his plans.

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Andrea sale al frente cuando los habitantes de Woodbury entran en territorio desconocido. En la prisión, se genera un nuevo peligro.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick trata de rescatar a uno de los miembros de su grupo. Woodbury está en estado de anarquía después del ataque reciente. Los nuevos huéspedes causan inquietud en la prisión.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Mientras el grupo debate sobre el curso de acción a seguir, Rick sale a buscar a un amigo perdido. Daryl y Merle cuestionan sus elecciones. El Gobernador restablece el orden en Woodbury y hace planes para castigar a los culpables.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Al peligrar su seguridad, Rick y el grupo deben tomar una decisión. Andrea está intranquila ahora que Woodbury se encuentra en estado de sitio.

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Roger helps a homeowner remove several overgrown shrubs in front of her house and plant many new perennials. The guys ask "What Is It?" and Richard helps quiet a noisy baseboard heater.

programme.title: Ask This Old House

programme.desc: Kevin installs a front porch light. The guys ask "What Is It?" and Roger shows Kevin a tip about splitting firewood. Richard helps a homeowner who has hot water coming from his cold-water faucet.

programme.desc: Richard installs a battery back-up sump pump. The guys ask "What Is It?" Tom fixes a rusty metal railing on a set of front steps and Kevin shares a tip about how to store a wheelbarrow.

programme.desc: Tom explains how to prevent ice dams and applies closed-cell spray foam in an attic. The guys ask "What Is It?", Richard connects gutter downspouts and Roger plants two trees on a busy city street.

programme.title: Ask This Old House

programme.desc: Scott upgrades electrical service from 100 to 200 amps (A service upgrade should only be performed by a licensed electrician). Roger Cook visits a garden designed to attract butterflies.

programme.title: Ask This Old House

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin works with a siding contractor to install a new vinyl window sill and casing. Then, plumbing and heating expert Richard Trethewey helps a homeowner install a new dishwasher.

programme.title: Ask This Old House

programme.title: Ask This Old House

programme.title: Ask This Old House

programme.title: Ask This Old House

programme.title: Ask This Old House

programme.title: Three's Company

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack believes Janet and Chrissy are going to oust him from the apartment when their former roommate suddenly shows up.

programme.desc: Janet and Chrissy think it's great when they learn that Jack is dating a "fantastic" older woman.

programme.desc: Chrissy nearly loses her job when Jack tries to save her from the lecherous advances of the firm's president.

programme.title: Three's Company

programme.title: Ultraman Geed
programme.desc: Aizaki Moa is Riku's childhood friend, and an agent for the Alien Investigation Bureau, a group that monitors aliens living on Earth. When her latest case seems to be tied to the Little Star incidents, the two are reunited for a giant monster to attack.

programme.title: Ultraman Geed
programme.desc: The best lead on a new Little Star seems to be a comedian with healing powers. Who will get to him first: Riku, the AIB, or the mysterious force behind the fusion monsters?

programme.title: Ultraman Ace
programme.desc: Yapool sends the terrible monster Verokron to an industrial complex in the hopes of taking over planet Earth. Verokron's attack destroys the city, taking Seiji Hokuto and Yuko Minami's lives. That's when the miracle of Ultra happens!

programme.title: Ultraman Ace
programme.desc: The Gold Egg from outer space and the Silver Egg from within the earth fuse together in the middle of Tokyo. TAC attacks this egg with a laser before it can hatch, but instead, the egg absorbs the laser's energy and terrible monster Chameleking is born.

programme.title: Ultraman Ace
programme.desc: Minami, while on patrol, observes a terrible monster attacking a passenger plane. TAC didn't see the terrible monster and concludes that the incident was an accident. Hokuto, in hopes of proving Minami right, starts an investigation on his own.

programme.title: Ultraman Ace
programme.desc: The Yapool takes away a recently discovered specimen of an ancient fish species dating back 300 million years. Meanwhile, Mikawa gets invited to a classmate and popular manga artist Mushitaro Kuri's house, but this is a conspiracy of the Yapool.

programme.title: Ultraman Ace
programme.desc: Multiple incidents are reported about women with blood type-O being sucked into an alternate dimension. This was the work of the Alien Giron and Terrible-Monster Aribunta. TAC comes to the rescue with the almighty Duckbill tank but is counter-attacked.

programme.title: Ultraman Ace
programme.desc: The Shinsei spaceship suddenly disappears from the radar while on its way back home from the moon. The pilot, Koyama, miraculously returns alive but is secretly possessed by Terrible-Monster Brocken. Atsushi notices something wrong but...

programme.title: Ultraman Ace
programme.desc: Mysterious Star Goran is on course for a head-on collision with Earth in exactly one week. In preparation, TAC was readying the interceptor missile Maria 1, but in a turn of events, Maria 1 gets destroyed by a revengeful Alien Metron Jr.

programme.title: Ultraman Ace
programme.desc: Alien Metron Jr., Terrible-Monster Doragory, and Monster Muruchi are brought back to life from underground by the effects of the approaching Mysterious Star Goran. Ace has a mighty difficult time battling with the three monsters.

programme.title: Ultraman Ace
programme.desc: Junko Samejima succeeds in photographing Terrible-Monster Gamas. The terrible monster soon disappears, but this was part of its plan. Gamas, who is able to travel back and forth from the two-dimensional world, was just waiting for the prints to roll.

programme.title: Ultraman Ace
programme.desc: Rumiko Murano and Jiro Sakata get caught up in this calamity but are saved by Hideki Go, an old friend of theirs who was supposed to have returned to his homeland. Jiro is ecstatic about this unexpected reunion, but Hokuto finds this suspicious...

programme.title: Ultraseven
programme.desc: In Kitagawa-cho, reports of violent cases increased rapidly without reasons. At the same time, an airplane crushed and the pilot is also from Kitagawa-cho. What is happening in the town?

programme.title: Ultraseven
programme.desc: One night, Furuhashi is attacked by a mysterious woman while patrolling. Seemingly her real target is Dan Moroboshi. But why would she do that? During an investigation, Dan meets an old man who sells toys. Is this old man related to the woman?

programme.title: Ultraseven
programme.desc: Akira, a boy who is close to the Ultra Guard member Anne, found his neighbor acting suspicious. After receiving the report, Anne went to Akira's house with Dan, where she witnesses Dan disappearing in front of her! Where is Dan?

programme.title: Ultraseven
programme.desc: Fatalities of young people have been increasing mysteriously in Mt. Iwami. Ultra Guard went for investigation, where Dan lost his life. As an action to take revenge of Dan, the members went into a cave and discovers a “Camera of Life”…

programme.title: Ultraseven
programme.desc: In chase of Alien Ayros' spaceship, Station Hawl came back to Earth. The dastardly Alien Ayros kidnapped Furuhashi and Amagi, and demanded to fuel his spaceship up in exchange. However, Ultra Guard will not tolerate an alien outlaw.

programme.title: Ultraseven
programme.desc: Murders of foreigners had been occurring continuously in the largest port city of Asia: Kobe. The perpetrator behind this is reviewed to be Alien Pedan, who misinterpreted the observation rocket as a sign of invasion...

programme.title: Ultraseven
programme.desc: After the attack of the super robot King Joe, analysis on how to defeat it has started among TDF. When Dan meets the Alien Pedan who kidnapped Dorothy, Alien Pedan offers a deal: if TDF stops the analysis, they will release Dorothy.

programme.title: Ultraseven

programme.title: Basketball Wives LA
programme.desc: Jackie's display at Angel Brinks's party causes a rift. Brandi and Duffey plan a BBQ to get to the bottom of Jackie's behavior. Tami confronts Duffey about her daughter's music video and makes a drastic decision. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives LA
programme.desc: Tami fires Duffey from her daughter's music video. Angel Brinks and Angel Love have it out with Jackie after her breakdown at Angel Brinks's party. Tami hustles to finish her daughter's music video in time for the release party. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives LA
programme.desc: Tami gets some scandalous information from a friend. Jackie tries to lose weight in order to keep Doug interested. At Tami's daughter's video release party, Angel Brinks gets blindsided and Jackie finds herself in the line of fire. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives LA
programme.desc: Jackie asks Malaysia to be by her side during a very personal weight loss procedure. Duffey apologizes to Tami's daughter in an attempt to make things right with Tami. Doug takes Jackie on a romantic date and reveals a huge surprise. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives LA
programme.desc: As the ladies all prepare for their trip to Portugal, Malaysia attempts to broker a peace between Tami and Duffey. Soon after her arrival, Duffey has second thoughts about her decision to come on the trip. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives LA
programme.desc: The ladies explore Portugal and try to relax, but the tension between Duffey and Tami has everyone on edge. Jackie fears the worst when she can't get ahold of Doug. Tami finally confronts Duffey in an explosive showdown. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives LA
programme.desc: After Tami and Duffey fight, Jackie must decide which one of them can stay and which one must return home. The results of a pregnancy test threaten to change everything for Tami. Doug surprises Jackie with a dream wedding in Portugal. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives LA
programme.desc: The ladies reunite on stage to take you inside the drama from the season. Tami and Duffey come face to face for the first time since their battle in Portugal. Angel Love and Brandi face off in an explosive argument. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives
programme.desc: Shaunie O'Neal returns to Miami for a night out with fellow basketball wives. Later, Royce Reed gets out of control during a dance contest at a Ludacris pool party, creating a fresh internet scandal. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives
programme.desc: Evelyn throws herself a 34th birthday party, which well-meaning Royce nearly tanks with a surprise dance routine. Jen struggles with the idea of sticking it out in her troubled marriage to Eric Williams. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives
programme.desc: Evelyn and Jen leave Miami to visit basketball fiancée Gloria Govan and Matt Barnes. Also, the girls go to a bust of a party that gets worse when they bump into an alleged groupie that may have been talking to Jen's husband. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives
programme.desc: Emotions get heated when Gloria defends her sister's role in an alleged scandal involving Shaunie. Suzie, Jen, and Royce make a splash when a second run-in with an alleged groupie turns into a fight on the streets of upscale Miami! Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Mob Wives
programme.desc: The ladies make peace in the wake of the tumultuous dinner, Karen reunites with daughter Karina, Carla prepares for Joe's release from prison, and Drita urges Renee to try online dating.

programme.title: Mob Wives
programme.desc: Karen is stung by harsh public reactions to her book project, Drita deals with some unwanted guests, and Renee's friends are frustrated by her lingering relationship with her unreliable ex.

programme.title: Mob Wives
programme.desc: Renee returns to work and makes a decision about Junior, Carla and her kids reunite with Joe after six long years, and Drita's not thrilled when Karen presents the first chapter of her book.

programme.title: Mob Wives
programme.desc: Drita considers a major life change when she receives some bad news, Renee is glad to be rid of Junior, and Karen's anger about her friend's betrayal explodes into chaos at a rooftop bar.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Siren the Voodoo Doll & Chainsaw take on The Tonga Twins and Miami's very own Sweet Heat in unbelievable Triple Threat Tag Team elimination action! BK Rhythm and Glitch the Gamer team up to take on the troubled team of Kandi Krush and Keta Rush!

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Tormenta & Wrecking Ball team up to take on Princess Aussie & Leia Makoa in can't miss tag team action! The Fabulous Lana Star accompanies Penelope Pink as she goes up against the formidable Jessie Jones!

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Kandi Krush learns who destroyed her beloved grandmother's boxing gloves and she wishes to settle the score – but David McLane has other ideas.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The night of action kicks off with a tag team showdown between Coach Campanelli & Randi Rah Rah and Gigi Gianni & Adriana Gambino whose drama will surprise fans before the bell ever sounds!

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Last week we learned in an exclusive interview with David McLane that The Beast has thrown her crutches to the side – and that her ankle rehab is over! With the crutches pushed aside, The Beast will return to WOW in the coming weeks...

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After finding the boxing gloves her grandmother gave her ripped to shreds, Kandi Krush has been on a rampage to get her hands on Chainsaw and must encounter Holidead and Voodoo on her way.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Exile is reintroduced after a mysterious time away. Is GiGi Gianni really ready to face a veteran opponent like the timeless Alpha Malia Hosaka all on her own?

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Beast returns to the ring for the first time since her leg injury and leaves the audience in utter shock. After a run-in backstage, Leia Makoa and Tiki Chamorro have a score to settle with the Fabulous Four.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Tonight marks the debut of a brand new WOW Superhero! Our very first Gen Z competitor - Jennifer Florez. Sahara Spars is eager to show she has what it takes to become the next top contender at WOW.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: With The Beast relinquishing her championship title due to injury, David McLane announces how WOW will determine the new World Champion.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The mother-daughter duo of Holly Swag and Big Rig Betty has everybody talking! Tonight they get a surprising shot at the WOW Tag Team Championships in the main event against Tag Team Champions Miami's Sweet Heat, Lindsey and Laurie Carlson.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Tonight, The Tonga Twins seek to even the odds as they face Exodus and Genesis of Team Exile in the main event of WOW!

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Tonight, we learn if Leia Makoa can get a payback or will she take another beat down at the hands of Wrecking Ball. Will Lana Star's protege get the better of Stephy Slays? Or will Stephy's indomitable spirit win the day?

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Lana Star's privileged protege and member of the Fab 4, Penelope Pink must defeat the high flying Princess Aussie to secure a shot at the WOW Championship.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh and Jason track down a fugitive in Texas wanted for murder in Arizona who they find is also sought by his wife who claims he is innocent.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A dying man offers Josh $2000 to find his son, who ran away from home 15 years ago.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh and Jason are escorting four prisoners - three men and one woman - to Leavenworth prison when a stranger begins following along behind asking to travel with the group for protection.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh is summoned for help when the Pinto bank is robbed.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh expects a $400 bounty for bringing in Daniel Trenner but finds his prisoner stolen from him by the sheriff.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh is hired by a woman to sober up Harry a drunk who is also Josh's friend.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh and the beautiful female prisoner he is transporting to trial are on a three-day trip while her partner is still on the loose in the area.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh is on his way to River City to transport three convicts there to be hanged.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A journalist from Boston accompanies Josh on his manhunt to get an exclusive story on a bounty hunter as part of a series of articles.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh feels compelled to repay a debt to an old friend who's in jail and may hang.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh brings in outlaw Carlos Domingo but he has to be released when the witness against him is killed in front of Josh.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh is sent for by Sheriff Mike Strata and the desperate men of Coronado.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh brings in a young man wanted for robbery but loses his reward and expenses.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh arrives in a town for rest and to gamble just as the local bank has been robbed.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A widow wants to hire/propose to Josh so she doesn't lose custody of her son.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A woman asks Josh, an old friend, to help find her husband Frank - a bounty hunter out to settle a score.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: When Randall has a sheriff bed a prisoner, the man's gang kidnaps the sheriff and two others and threatens to kill one per day until the man is freed.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: In Mexico, Josh is hired to protect a sensible man and his pregnant wife from his father-in-law and the villagers who are angered when he refuses the town healing woman or \\"witch\\".

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: After Josh reluctantly takes the task of finding a man and his wife's pet ewe, he becomes the butt of many jokes in the community while cattlemen nearly hang him when he mentions sheep.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: When a convicted killer escapes prison, Josh is hired for $500 to protect the woman whose testimony put him there.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh rides into a town looking for a man who asked him to come there for a job that pays $500.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh is hired by Harry Weaver to track down his twin brother Pete, who's wanted with a $500 bounty on him.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh is called in to track down a new outlaw - the local sheriff who is a friend.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh reluctantly takes a job protecting a beautiful deaf, mute, teenage girl and keeping everyone off the father's place for a day or two.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh escorts an East Coast photographer to take a picture of his friend El Gato (The Cat), who is a famous, hilarious bandit living in the hills of Mexico with a small army.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A broke Josh is hired by a fearful man to help him elope with his sweetheart, Jane, the daughter of a local rancher.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh takes a job for $200 protecting an express office employee who stole $10,000 and wants to return it before it's discovered missing.

programme.title: Halloween Baking Championship
programme.desc: The four remaining bakers create tomb-themed desserts; the bakers make a dessert inspired by the colorful artistry and spirit of Mexico's Dia de los Muertos, or Day of the Dead; the winners move on to the Halloween Baking Championship finale.

programme.title: Halloween Baking Championship
programme.desc: The final three bakers must fill a haunted tree with decorated Halloween cookies; the bakers have just six hours to construct a spooky ginger dead house; special guest Duff Goldman stops by; the baker with the most impressive house wins $25,000.

programme.title: Halloween Baking Championship
programme.desc: Eight bakers show off their decorating skills by creating Halloween candy-filled cookies; for the main heat, it's oozy fun with sublime slime desserts where bakers can make any treat, but it must be filled with a gooey slime.

programme.title: Halloween Baking Championship
programme.desc: Seven remaining bakers must make witches' fingers and toes and create a sauce to dip them in; the witch theme goes a step further in the main heat when the bakers must create desserts that look like witches, complete with edible brooms.

programme.title: Halloween Baking Championship
programme.desc: Bakers work in teams and put their minds together to create the most outrageous and delicious left brain/right brain desserts; in the main heat, the bakers face their fears by using common phobias like insects and ghosts as inspirations for desserts.

programme.title: Halloween Baking Championship
programme.desc: Five remaining bakers take a light, sweet and utterly harmless dessert and head to the dark side; it's a main heat filled with frights as the bakers make scary mask desserts to spook the judges; one baker is eliminated at the end of the round.

programme.title: Halloween Baking Championship
programme.desc: Four remaining bakers attempt to make desserts that taste like their favorite candy bars; bakers face death by chocolate and must create a dessert that combines chocolate with odd ingredients; one baker is eliminated.

programme.title: Halloween Baking Championship
programme.desc: The remaining bakers must make a glowing edible centerpiece and three accompanying creepy treats for a dessert bar.

programme.title: Halloween Baking Championship
programme.desc: The competition begins with a difficult pre-heat as the eight Halloween bakers weave spider web desserts with creatures inside; wily witch hunter John Henson challenges the bakers to create melting desserts that reveal a Halloween item inside.

programme.title: Halloween Baking Championship
programme.desc: In the "Silence of the Yams" pre-heat challenge, bakers make yam desserts that evoke classic scary movie cliches from chainsaws and hockey masks to bloody knives and creepy dolls; bakers create a pumpkin patch out of mini bundt cakes.

programme.title: Halloween Baking Championship
programme.desc: John Henson takes a sugar-fueled look back at some of the most outrageous moments and disgustingly delicious desserts, including creepy-crawly critters, bloodiest baking, spine-tingling ingredients, comedy of horrors and top 10 judges' costumes.

programme.title: Halloween Baking Championship
programme.desc: A monster has ransacked the kitchen and is on the loose; the bakers work together in the pre-heat challenge to create a 3-D suspect sketch out of pate a choux; the sketch helps puts the monster behind bars but now he's hungry for the main challenge.

programme.title: Halloween Baking Championship
programme.desc: It's bridal season for Halloween lovers and since bridal showers often have petit fours, the bakers are creating petit horrors in the pre-heat challenge; in the main heat, each happy couple gets a unique Halloween wedding cake.

programme.title: Halloween Baking Championship
programme.desc: Bakers enter the fortune-telling tent at the Circus of Dread in the pre-heat challenge; competitors are tasked with creating tarot card desserts; bakers then enter the Creepy Clown Hall of Fame in the main heat, where they create impressive desserts.

programme.title: Halloween Baking Championship
programme.desc: Inspired by a skull man, the bakers enter the graveyard to bring skull desserts to life in the pre-heat; for the main heat, the bakers must create a nightmare cake based on common nightmare themes; the bakers must face their fears to come out on top.

programme.title: Halloween Baking Championship
programme.desc: John Henson kicks off the competition by revealing all the skeletons in his family's closet to inspire the eight bakers as they make scary skeleton desserts; the main heat is monster madness as the bakers conjure up monster-under-the-bed creations.

programme.title: Halloween Baking Championship
programme.desc: The bakers use fresh flavors and colorful decorations to bring old desserts back to life and impress the judges in the Day of the Dead main heat.
